fields.description:
## Context / Problem
The approved Mypy flags have a measured, bounded cleanup surface under the canonical Mypy 2.3.0 environment. no_implicit_optional and strict_equality are clean. src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py contains two cast() calls at lines 514-515, but Mypy 2.3.0 classifies only the int cast at line 515 as redundant. warn_unused_ignores reports 23 diagnostics across 19 source files. Because unused-ignore results can change with Mypy, Python, dependency stubs, and optional extras, cleanup must be performed only in the pinned, fully provisioned CI environment.

## Approach
1. Depend on the approved dependency-freezing work to pin the canonical Mypy version and provision all project extras used by CI.
2. Add a failing ratchet test that requires no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores while explicitly preserving the deferral of disallow_any_generics and disallow_untyped_defs.
3. Run standalone diagnostics in the canonical environment: mypy src/rebar --warn-redundant-casts and mypy src/rebar --warn-unused-ignores.
4. Remove the one cast proven redundant without changing behavior. For each reported unused ignore, inspect the suppressed error and relevant optional-dependency environment before editing it. Remove an ignore only when the canonical fully provisioned environment proves it stale; otherwise preserve it and narrow or document configuration so the suppression remains intentional and stable.
5. Enable the four approved global flags and run the canonical typecheck plus behavior-adjacent tests.

Rejected: enabling disallow_any_generics or disallow_untyped_defs, because the operator explicitly deferred those flags. Rejected: blindly deleting all ignores from a single environment's output, because that can break optional or version-contingent typechecking.

## Scope
Configuration and ratchet:
- pyproject.toml
- tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py

Redundant-cast inspection:
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py (two casts exist; Mypy 2.3.0 reports only line 515)

The 23 observed warn_unused_ignores diagnostics:
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_comments.py:60
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_fields.py:42
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_differ.py:68
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/differ.py:37,77
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/apply_base.py:39
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_check.py:37
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/binding_store.py:228
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py:36
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_ref_lock.py:86
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_helpers.py:44
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/invariants.py:213
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/acli.py:464
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/run_differs.py:46
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/rebar_id_audit.py:48
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_advisory_lock.py:51
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_fields.py:48
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_translate.py:151,311
- src/rebar/__main__.py:70,102
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/schema.py:86,100

Line numbers are the observed Mypy 2.3.0 baseline and may shift; implementation scope is limited to these diagnostics and their containing files. Any newly surfaced diagnostic is recorded as discovered work rather than silently expanding this story.

## Testing / Verification
- Red: tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py fails before the four flags are configured.
- Baseline commands in the pinned, fully provisioned environment:
  - mypy src/rebar --warn-redundant-casts
  - mypy src/rebar --warn-unused-ignores
- Green: the focused ratchet test passes and make typecheck exits zero.
- Regression: focused tests for every behavior-adjacent edited module and the default test suite pass; exact commands and outcomes are recorded on the ticket.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] pyproject.toml enables no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores globally; tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py verifies all four settings.
- [ ] In the pinned, fully provisioned canonical environment, mypy src/rebar --warn-redundant-casts and mypy src/rebar --warn-unused-ignores both exit zero, and make typecheck exits zero.
- [ ] Each of the 23 baseline unused-ignore diagnostics is individually revalidated before editing; stale ignores are removed, while environment-dependent suppressions are preserved and narrowed or documented rather than misclassified.
- [ ] The editor change removes only the cast Mypy proves redundant; the adjacent cast(str, ...) remains unless Mypy independently diagnoses it.
- [ ] disallow_any_generics and disallow_untyped_defs are not added or broadened; the ratchet test verifies this deferred scope.
- [ ] Focused tests for behavior-adjacent edited modules and the default suite pass, with commands and outcomes recorded on the ticket.
